title: Meeting library
deleteConfirm: Delete “{{projectName}}” and all of its local data? This cannot be undone.
deleteActiveGuard: Stop the meeting before deleting it.
deleteProcessingGuard: Wait for processing to finish before deleting it.
workspaceDescription: Find and manage meetings stored on this device.
noSearchResults: No meetings match the current search and filters.
emptyHint: Start a meeting or upload a file to create your first project.
renameDialogDescription: Only the title will change. The transcript, files, and generated results stay the same.
deleteDialogDescription: This permanently removes the meeting and its AccordMesh-managed local data.
